reasoning: Pixel art is largely clean. Hard-tone palette, no gradient shading, no melting details, no visible AA blending — edges step cleanly at 8x. Border outline is consistent thickness throughout. Corner stud decoration is regular. Semantic read is coherent (inventory action button with item icons). Two concerns keep this out of pass territory: (1) Icon placement within the button is noticeably asymmetric — the six icons are scattered without apparent grid anchor, more consistent with an AI compositor than a hand-placed layout. (2) The beige/tan fill in the large 8x version shows faint pixel-level chroma variation in what should be a flat tone — subtle noise pattern inconsistent with clean hand-painted pixel art. No color bleed or sub-pixel fractional features detected. No semantic failures. The tells are marginal rather than clear failures, warranting a 7.
